title: MODERATE: form.tsx uses as-unknown-as-undefined type hack
description: M5: src/components/ui/form.tsx:80 — `useFormState({ name: name as unknown as undefined })` double-cast is a workaround for mismatched types between the component's generic parameter and react-hook-form's API. Fragile — a react-hook-form version bump could break it silently.
resolution: Replaced as unknown as undefined cast with proper Parameters-based type cast in useFormState call
